# Hireshore

> Done-for-you delivery pods that give product teams and agencies full-time capacity without full-time overhead. Vetted talent from Nepal, managed by experienced team leads.

Hireshore builds and manages dedicated offshore teams — "delivery pods" — for startups, agencies, and scale-ups. Each pod is staffed with vetted talent, led by an experienced pod lead, and designed to plug into your workflows as a fully managed extension of your team. Services cover web development, design, video production, SEO/content, marketing operations, data/AI, and support/QA.

## Pages

- [/](/): Homepage — delivery pods overview, case studies, testimonials, FAQ, and booking
- [/services](/services): Full services catalog and delivery pod types
- [/solutions](/solutions): Business solutions by outcome and role
- [/case-studies](/case-studies): Real client results and growth stories
- [/about-us](/about-us): Company mission, team, and values
- [/pricing](/pricing): Transparent pricing and engagement models
- [/staffing](/staffing): Recruitment, compliance, trial, and dedicated talent
- [/industries](/industries): Vertical-specific delivery pod programs
- [/resources](/resources): Guides, templates, case notes, and webinars library
- [/contact-us](/contact-us): Get in touch and book a strategy call
- [/configure-pod](/configure-pod): Build a custom delivery pod for your needs
- [/delivery-pods](/delivery-pods): Delivery pod offerings and capabilities
- [/privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy
- [/terms](/terms): Terms of service
- [/legal](/legal): Legal information
